name: Cherry Blossom Crossbody
description: A one-of-a-kind crossbody messenger built on a teal carbon-fiber base with a hand-selected cherry blossom fabric flap. The print features whimsical blue cats perched among blooms — playful, detailed, and completely original. Adjustable strap, magnetic snap closure, and the Sew Nerdy Bags leather label stitched to the front.
